title: Mahindra & Mahindra is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra & Mahindra is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!
